data.body: Naming-drift risk for the id->rule mapping (surfaced in #751 review): the config id is 'american_indian_alaska_native' (no 'or') while Rules::ExclusionRuleset uses 'american_indian_or_alaska_native' (with 'or', in AMERICAN_INDIAN_OR_ALASKA_NATIVE + the race_ethnicity value). Different namespaces today so not a current bug, but whoever wires id->rule here must not let the off-by-one-word silently miss.
